name: aiostreammagic

metadata.name: aiostreammagic
metadata.summary: An async python package for interfacing with Cambridge Audio / Stream Magic compatible streamers.

documentation:
# aiostreammagic #### An async python package for interfacing with Cambridge Audio / Stream Magic compatible streamers [**📖 Read the docs »**][docs] [![GitHub Release][releases-shield]][releases] [![Python Versions][python-versions-shield]][pypi] [![Downloads][downloads-shield]][pypi] ![Project Maintenance][maintenance-shield] [![License][license-shield]](LICENSE.md)
# About This module implements a Python client for the Stream Magic API used to control Cambridge Audio streamers. The API connects over websockets and supports several streamers, receivers, and pre-amps. ## Supported Devices - Cambridge Audio Evo 75 - Cambridge Audio Evo 150 - Cambridge Audio CXN - Cambridge Audio CXN (v2) - Cambridge Audio CXR120 - Cambridge Audio CXR200 - Cambridge Audio 851N - Cambridge Audio Edge NQ If your model is not on the list of supported devices, and everything works correctly then add it to the list by opening a pull request. # Installation ```shell pip install aiostreammagic ``` # Examples ## Basic Example ```python import asyncio from aiostreammagic import StreamMagicClient, Source, Info HOST = "192.168.20.218" async def main(): """Basic demo entrypoint.""" client = StreamMagicClient("192.168.20.218") await client.connect() info: Info = await client.get_info() sources: list[Source] = await client.get_sources() print(f"Model: {info.model}") for source in sources: print(f"Name: {source.id} ({source.id})") await client.disconnect() if __name__ == '__main__': asyncio.run(main()) ``` ## Subscription Example The Cambridge Audio StreamMagic API can automatically notify the client of changes instead of the need for polling. Register a callback to be called whenver new information is available. ```python import asyncio from aiostreammagic import StreamMagicClient HOST = "192.168.20.218" async def on_state_change(client: StreamMagicClient): """Called when new information is received.""" print(f"System info: {client.get_info()}") print(f"Sources: {client.get_sources()}") print(f"State: {client.get_state()}") print(f"Play State: {client.get_play_state()}") print(f"Now Playing: {client.get_now_playing()}") async def main(): """Subscribe demo entrypoint.""" client = StreamMagicClient("192.168.20.218") await client.register_state_update_callbacks(on_state_change) await client.connect() # Play media using the unit's front controls or StreamMagic app await asyncio.sleep(60) await client.disconnect() if __name__ == '__main__': asyncio.run(main()) ``` [license-shield]: https://img.shields.io/github/license/noahhusby/aiostreammagic.svg [docs]: https://noahhusby.github.io/aiostreammagic/ [downloads-shield]: https://img.shields.io/pypi/dm/aiostreammagic [python-versions-shield]: https://img.shields.io/pypi/pyversions/aiostreammagic [maintenance-shield]: https://img.shields.io/maintenance/yes/2024.svg [releases-shield]: https://img.shields.io/github/release/noahhusby/aiostreammagic.svg [releases]: https://github.com/noahhusby/aiostreammagic/releases [pypi]: https://pypi.org/project/aiostreammagic/

documentation: Data class representing StreamMagic play state metadata.

documentation: Data class representing StreamMagic play state.

documentation: Data class representing StreamMagic preset table.

documentation: Data class representing StreamMagic audio output.

documentation: Asynchronous Python client for StreamMagic API.

documentation: Return True if device is connected.

documentation: Establish a connection with a WebSocket.

methods.name: aiostreammagic.stream_magic.StreamMagicClient._send
documentation: Send a command to the device.

documentation: Return a type-guaranteed instance of Info

documentation: Return a type-guaranteed instance of State

documentation: Return a type-guaranteed instance of PlayState

documentation: Return a type-guaranteed instance of NowPlaying

documentation: Return a type-guaranteed instance of AudioOutput

documentation: Return a type-guaranteed instance of Update

documentation: Return a type-guaranteed instance of PresetList

methods.name: aiostreammagic.stream_magic.StreamMagicClient.get_play_state
documentation: Get play state information from device.

methods.name: aiostreammagic.stream_magic.StreamMagicClient.get_now_playing
documentation: Get now playing information from device.

methods.name: aiostreammagic.stream_magic.StreamMagicClient.get_audio_output
documentation: Get audio output information from device.

methods.name: aiostreammagic.stream_magic.StreamMagicClient.get_preset_list
documentation: Get preset list information from device.

methods.name: aiostreammagic.stream_magic.StreamMagicClient.power_on
documentation: Set the power of the device to on.

methods.name: aiostreammagic.stream_magic.StreamMagicClient.power_off
documentation: Set the power of the device to network.

methods.name: aiostreammagic.stream_magic.StreamMagicClient.volume_up
documentation: Increase the volume of the device by 1.

methods.name: aiostreammagic.stream_magic.StreamMagicClient.volume_down
documentation: Increase the volume of the device by -1.

methods.name: aiostreammagic.stream_magic.StreamMagicClient.set_volume
documentation: Set the volume of the device.

methods.name: aiostreammagic.stream_magic.StreamMagicClient.set_mute
documentation: Set the mute of the device.

methods.name: aiostreammagic.stream_magic.StreamMagicClient.set_source
documentation: Set the source of the device.

methods.name: aiostreammagic.stream_magic.StreamMagicClient.set_source_by_id
documentation: Set the source of the device.

methods.name: aiostreammagic.stream_magic.StreamMagicClient.media_seek
documentation: Set the media position of the device.

methods.name: aiostreammagic.stream_magic.StreamMagicClient.set_shuffle
documentation: Set the shuffle of the device.

methods.name: aiostreammagic.stream_magic.StreamMagicClient.set_repeat
documentation: Set the repeat of the device.

methods.name: aiostreammagic.stream_magic.StreamMagicClient.play_radio_url
documentation: Play a radio station from a provided url.

methods.name: aiostreammagic.stream_magic.StreamMagicClient.set_audio_output
documentation: Set the audio output of the device.

methods.name: aiostreammagic.stream_magic.StreamMagicClient.set_pre_amp_mode
documentation: Sets whether the internal pre-amp is enabled.

methods.name: aiostreammagic.stream_magic.StreamMagicClient.set_volume_limit
documentation: Sets the volume limit for the internal pre-amp. Value must be between 0 and 100.

methods.name: aiostreammagic.stream_magic.StreamMagicClient.set_display_brightness
documentation: Set the display brightness of the device.

methods.name: aiostreammagic.stream_magic.StreamMagicClient.set_early_update
documentation: Set whether the device should be on the early update channel.

methods.name: aiostreammagic.stream_magic.StreamMagicClient.recall_preset
documentation: Recall a preset for the device.
Client for handling connections with StreamMagic enabled devices.
